title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 351.1189 - Receivers, requirements
text:
351.1189.  Receivers, requirements. — 1.  A receiver shall be a natural person or a domestic business entity or a foreign business entity authorized to transact business in this state.  A receiver shall give a bond as directed by the court with the sureties required by the court.
  2.  A receiver may sue and defend in all courts as receiver of the cooperative.  The court appointing the receiver has exclusive jurisdiction over the cooperative and its property.
(L. 2011 S.B. 366)
